findings.title: Required mission-artifact validation proof does not reproduce
findings.rationale: The spec requires `codex1 internal validate-mission-artifacts --mission-id ralph-control-loop-boundary`, and the receipt claims it passed, but both `target/debug/codex1 internal validate-mission-artifacts --mission-id ralph-control-loop-boundary` and `cargo run -q -p codex1 -- internal validate-mission-artifacts --mission-id ralph-control-loop-boundary` currently report `cached state.json does not match authoritative rebuild from hidden mission files`. The state, gates, and closeouts hashes match the frozen review-truth snapshot, so this is an evidence/proof gap in the reviewed bundle rather than a later live drift artifact.
findings.suggested_next_action: Repair or rebuild the mission cached state so mission-artifact validation passes, rerun the required validation command, and refresh the proof receipt before this slice is cleared.
